content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity bonus calibration (a core open challenge in comparing ICM, RND, and other curious RL agents) as an active memory pruning problem that leverages 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures. Instead of tuning intrinsic reward scales manually or via heuristics, curious agents can actively select which unexpected state embeddings to retain in long-term episodic memory to automatically maintain a stable, non-saturating curiosity gradient.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
